title: centaurea × augustinii
intro: Centaurea × augustinii, also known as the Centaurea × augustinii or Cornflower, is a perennial plant that is a hybrid of the Cornflower (Centaurea cyanus) and a closely related species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × augustinii include reducing inflammation, calming the nervous system, and promoting wound healing, among others. Centaurea × augustinii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health enthusiasts.
